title: ptychotis intermedia
intro: Ptychotis intermedia, also known as the Winter's cress or Horned poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a valuable herb for treating digestive disorders and other health conditions. Ptychotis intermedia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
